title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Godrej Properties

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Godrej Properties
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Properties are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Properties:
Godrej Properties is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
